info.name: Email Server API
info.description: Collection for testing email server with MailHog (local) and Gmail (global) sending capabilities

request.description: Sends an email to MailHog SMTP server for local testing. Check MailHog UI at http://localhost:8025 to see the email.
Sends a real email through Gmail SMTP server. Requires GMAIL_USER and GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD environment variables to be configured in docker-compose.yml

item.name: Send HTML Email with Custom From (Gmail)

request.description: Example of sending a formatted HTML email with custom sender name through Gmail SMTP. Useful for automated test reports.
Sends a plain text only email to MailHog. No HTML content included.
Example of sending an email to multiple recipients. Separate email addresses with commas.
Test case for missing required field 'subject'. Should return 400 Bad Request error.
